apply.title: Apply to {group}
apply.subtitle: Submit a membership application for the group team to review.

status_messages.pending: Your membership application is waiting for review.
status_messages.declined: This membership application was declined. You can submit a new one.

validation.pending_exists: You already have a pending membership application for this group.

review.title: Membership Applications
review.subtitle: Review, approve, or decline people waiting to join this group.
review.reviewed_subtitle: Recently approved and declined membership applications.
review.empty_pending_description: New membership applications will appear here.
review.empty_reviewed_description: Approved and declined membership applications will appear here.

decline_modal.title: Decline membership application
decline_modal.reason_help: Optional. Keep it short and useful for the group record.

validation.already_reviewed: This membership application has already been reviewed.
validation.applicant_banned: Banned users cannot be approved into the group.

form.title: Application Form
form.subtitle: Create the membership questions people answer before joining.
form.inactive_title: This form is ready, but the group is not application based
form.inactive_description: Switch the group join mode to Application Based when you want this form to appear to applicants.
form.question_hint: Name, describe, and configure this application field.

description.label: Description
description.help: Optional extra context below the question.

required.label: Required
required.help: Applicants must provide an answer. A toggle can be on or off.

options.title: Options
options.subtitle: Select menu questions need at least one option.
options.label: Option {number}

validation.minimum_fields: Application forms need at least one question.
validation.max_fields: Application forms can have up to {max} questions.
validation.field_invalid: Each question must be a valid object.
validation.localized_text_max: Localized text must be {max} characters or fewer.
validation.options_required: Select menu questions need at least one option.
validation.options_max: Select menu questions can have up to {max} options.
validation.option_invalid: Each option must be a valid object.
validation.answer_unknown: This answer does not match the current application form.
validation.answer_max: This answer must be {max} characters or fewer.
validation.answer_option_invalid: Choose one of the available options.
